title: Enrollment of Ships. A ship shall be enrolled with only one (1)
content: 1 principal/employer and LMA. 2 3 However, a ship involving special types/operations may be enrolled to more than one (1) 4 principal/employer and LMA, such as but not limited to: 5 6 1. Cruise ships; 7 2. Offshore/Platform; 8 3. Survey/Research; 9 4. Dredger/Driller; 10 5. Supply; 11 6. Pontoon; 12 7. Accommodation Barge; or 13 8. Other ships with special features and modes of operation as may be classified by 14 the Department. 15 16 The Department may allow other principals/employers to enroll a merchant/running 17 vessel that is currently enrolled with another LMA under a different principal for highly 18 technical or specialized operation, subject to guidelines as may be prescribed by the 19 Department. 20 21
